signals.npcLine: Shadow nets flicker; markets twitch under cold fear.

signals.worldFeed: Global credits wobble, whispers of a dip ripple.
signals.clueEvent: Cryptos fade in neon haze; trust frays further.

signals.clueEvent: Watch quiet nodes; still water hides sharp edges.

signals.worldFeed: Sentiment low, fear grips neon market veins.
